nasb.text: Then David became angry because of the Lord’s outburst against Uzza; and he called that place Perez-uzza to this day.

esv.text: And David was angry because the Lord had broken out against Uzzah. And that place is called Perez-uzza to this day.

cnv.text: 大衛因耶和華忽然殺死烏撒，非常不悅，就稱那地方為毘列斯．烏撒，直到今日。

ccb.text: 大卫因耶和华击杀乌撒而烦恼，就称那地方为毗列斯·乌撒，沿用至今。
